data.title: Wo de Shizun Shi Wukong
data.synopsis:
Yuan Huai participated in his family's trials, but during the trials, villains stole his chance to cultivate immortality. His mother was murdered, his sister was kidnapped, and he himself was severely injured and thrown off a cliff. On the verge of death at the bottom of the cliff, he encountered Sun Wukong, who had been suppressed under Five Fingers Mountain ten thousand years ago. He gained the opportunity to become Sun Wukong's disciple and was reborn. He escaped from the bottom of the cliff to avenge his mother, and with Sun Wukong's help, he entered the immortal realm and embarked on the path of cultivating immortality to save his sister.

(Source: Tencent, translated)

titles.title: Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (Hokori)!
ヒロイン?聖女?いいえ、オールワークスメイドです(誇)!
Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)!

data.title: Heroine? Seijo? Iie, All Works Maid desu (Hokori)!
data.title_english: Heroine? Saint? No, I'm an All-Works Maid (And Proud of It)!
data.title_japanese: ヒロイン?聖女?いいえ、オールワークスメイドです(誇)!
data.synopsis:
"I will become the world's most wonderful maid!" With her skirt fluttering in black and white, the girl shouted. Her name is Melody. A reincarnated former Japanese girl, she now pursues her dream in her new life, working as an all-purpose maid for a poor count's family in the kingdom of Théolas. When she makes it, even cheap tea turns into a luxury brew, and a dilapidated mansion is quickly restored to new! Cleaning, serving, hunting, DIY—leave it all to her and her powerful magic.

Unbeknownst to Melody, this world is actually an otome game, and she is the most powerful and invincible heroine, the saint! Yet, she remains oblivious to this fact. Romance with handsome men? Attacks by the Demon Lord? Work comes first! A fantasy of misunderstood work that unknowingly shatters destiny!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

An Observation Log of My Fiancée Who Calls Herself a Villainess

data.title: Jishou Akuyaku Reijou na Konyakusha no Kansatsu Kiroku.
data.title_english: An Observation Log of My Fiancée Who Calls Herself a Villainess
data.title_japanese: 自称悪役令嬢な婚約者の観察記録。
title_synonyms: Observation Records of My Fiancée: The Misadventures of a Self-Proclaimed Villainess
Fiancé's Observation Record of a Self-proclaimed Villainess
data.synopsis:
For a natural genius like Crown Prince Cecil Glow Alfostar, every day is a bore. Knowledge and skills come far too easily for him, to the point that nothing can captivate his interest. However, this changes the day he meets someone who never fails to betray his expectations—his fiancée and self-proclaimed villainess Bertia Evil Nochesse.

Bertia claims that this world is that of an "otome game." She has been reborn as the villainess, and it is her duty to impede the relationship between Cecil and the heroine. Never one to shy away from fate, she zealously takes to her evil role... to mixed results. Though she doesn't realize it, Bertia's supposedly "evil deeds" always come off as sincere and kind. Finally relieved of his melancholy, there is never a boring day for Cecil as he observes his unknowingly good-hearted fiancée.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Each episode was streamed three days in advance of the TV broadcast starting on April 3, 2026, on Prime Video. Regular broadcasting began on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Android wa Keiken Ninzuu ni Hairimasu ka??

data.title_japanese: アンドロイドは経験人数に入りますか??
title_synonyms: Does It Count If You Lose Your Virginity to an Android?
data.synopsis:
Office Lady Tsuda Akane, age 28, seems like she's got it all together. Beautiful, brainy, and an indispensable office worker for a robotics manufacturer, Akane's admired at work...because her colleagues can't see her at home. Privately, Akane's a hot mess with an apartment that looks more like a landfill than a living space. Good thing she drunkenly ordered a new android named Nadeshiko to help her clean up! Well, maybe not good, because the beautiful lady android that arrives is a horny hottie. Akane's about to get more service than she expected!

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titles.title: Tamala 2030: A Punk Cat in Dark
Tamala 2030: A Punk Cat in Dark

data.title: Tamala 2030: A Punk Cat in Dark
data.title_japanese: Tamala 2030: A Punk Cat in Dark
data.synopsis:
Carefree, coquettish, and capricious, Tamala is the cutest girl-cat in dystopian Cat Tokyo, year 2030—or at any other point in the time/space continuum. She has randomly invited herself along on her detective friend Michelangelo's missing-person investigation. It seems the case is one of seven sudden vanishings in an astronomical pattern across Cat Japan that occurred at the exact same moment one night. Their search leads ever deeper into a mystery with ancient, occult roots and apocalyptic implications—and threads leading to Tamala herself. Shadowed by a covert agent of the Catty & Co. consortium, she may in fact be the greatest enigma. Indolent ingénue? Megacorporate mascot? Mythic messiah, or manifestation of cosmic malevolence? Anyhow, wow—she sure is a great dancer!

(Source: Fantasia International Film Festival)

titles.title: Gakkou de wa Oshiete Kurenai Taisetsu na Koto
学校では教えてくれない大切なこと

data.title: Gakkou de wa Oshiete Kurenai Taisetsu na Koto
data.title_japanese: 学校では教えてくれない大切なこと
data.synopsis:
Unique and reliable "experts" appear before elementary school students who are struggling with issues such as "I'm not good at tidying up," "I keep putting off my homework because I'm so obsessed with games," and "My grades aren't improving as much as I'd like," and provide passionate instruction to teach them important things that they should learn but that they won't learn at school.

(Source: MANTANWEB, translated)

data.title: Toritsukare Otoko
data.synopsis:
Giuseppe is a young man who tends to get completely absorbed in whatever catches his interest. Because of this, the townspeople call him "Toristukare Otoko." One day, he falls in love at first sight with a girl named Pechka, who sells balloons but seems to carry a quiet sadness. Wanting to help her, Giuseppe and his mouse companion, Cielo, start using the skills he's picked up over the years to secretly solve the problems weighing on her heart.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: 斗罗大陆剧场版 剑道尘心

data.title: Douluo Dalu: Jiandao Chen Xin
data.title_japanese: 斗罗大陆剧场版 剑道尘心
data.synopsis:
Two decades before the final battle of Douluo Continent, the Martial Soul Hall conspired to dominate the entire soul master world by annexing all sects. The Seven Treasure Glazed Clan was the first to bear the brunt of this crisis. As the clan faced imminent peril, the Bone Soul Master took the clan's young heir—five-year-old Ning Rongrong, to seek the Sword Soul Master's aid. Thus, the Sword Soul Master Chen Xin embarked on a perilous life-or-death escape with Rongrong. Unbeknownst to them, this journey would unravel a looming conspiracy destined to reshape the fate of the Douluo Continent……

(Source: WeTV)

data.title: Liaozhai: Lanre Si
data.synopsis:
Young scholar Pu Songling encountered danger on his journey and had no choice but to spend the night at Lanre Temple. There, he was captured by a toad and a turtle and taken to the bottom of a strange ancient well. The two spirits competed to tell stories and forced Pu Songling to judge the quality of the stories. In the end, Pu Songling, left with no other option, also told his own wonderful story.

(Source: Douban, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Pu Songling's novel, Liaozhai Zhiyi (聊齋誌異).

data.title: Da Yuan Hun
data.synopsis:
Demons are rampant, countless lives are lost. A strange stone descends in the troubled times, transforming into a clever stone monkey, shouldering the responsibility of saving the world. Because this is the origin of Sun Wukong becoming a great demon, the ape soul is about to awaken!

(Source: Tencent, Google translated)

titles.title: and I Don't Need an S-Rank Party!
Sランクパーティから解雇された【呪具師】

data.title: S-Rank Party kara Kaiko sareta "Jugushi"
data.title_japanese: Sランクパーティから解雇された【呪具師】
title_synonyms: and I Don't Need an S-Rank Party!
data.synopsis:
Gail Hamilton is a "curse crafter" who got booted from his party for allegedly not pulling his weight...right after they were promoted to the Guild's "S" rank. Unfortunately, the party didn't realize that Gail's cursed goods pack the power of holy relics and legendary gear! But too bad for them, because Gail's going it alone now...and causing a sensation with the creepy-yet-useful curses he works with!

(Source: Kodansha)
